div.h3: DIAGRAM M3-01: CHAINED HASH TABLE CACHE INEFFICIENCY
div.p: Focus: Pointer Chasing Latency & Fragmented Heap Access
Data Structure: std::list<Entry> buckets[N] (Chained Hash Table)
Root Cause: "Pointer Chasing" prevents Instruction Level Parallelism (ILP). The CPU cannot issue the load for Node[n+1] until Node[n] has returned from DRAM.
Recommended fix: Use Open Addressing (Linear Probing) to utilize Hardware Prefetching.
